whyUs.title: Real silver. Guaranteed.
whyUs.subtitle: We know buying jewelry online is scary. That's why we're fully transparent.
whyUs.item1Desc: Properly cared for .925 silver lasts a lifetime. We explain exactly how to care for it when you receive it.
whyUs.item2Desc: No nickel, no lead. Certified under NOM-033/1-SE-2020 for direct skin contact.
whyUs.item3Desc: Every piece includes a physical certificate from the Silver Regulatory Council A.C. Your lifetime guarantee.
whyUs.item4Desc: Mexican artisans. Mexican silver. Every purchase supports local workshops and fair trade.

process.title: Buying is easy
process.subtitle: No forms, no waiting. Just you and your jewelry.
process.step1Desc: Browse the collections and find the one you love.
process.step2Desc: Tell us which one you want and your size if needed. We reply in minutes.
process.step3Desc: We send real photos of your piece and a quote with shipping included.
process.step4Desc: We ship across the USA. Discreet, secure packaging with tracking number.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 500 women already wear PLATA925.
testimonials.t1Text: I'd been hesitant to buy silver online but the hologram certificate convinced me. My hoop earrings are beautiful and haven't tarnished at all.
testimonials.t2Text: I gifted my mom a bracelet for her birthday and she cried. The quality is incredible for the price. It arrived beautifully packaged.
testimonials.t3Text: The heart charm looks exactly as shown on the page, even more beautiful in person. They replied on WhatsApp in 5 minutes.
testimonials.t4Text: This is my third purchase and they keep impressing me. The rings are perfect for my sensitive skin, never any reaction.
testimonials.t5Text: I was so moved to receive the Regulatory Council certificate. You can tell this is real silver. My earrings are my favorite piece.
testimonials.t6Text: I bought a chain for my wife and she was thrilled. They helped me choose the right length on WhatsApp. Excellent service.

certification.title: The backing your silver deserves
certification.body: Every PLATA925 piece is certified under Mexican Official Standard NOM-033/1-SE-2020, endorsed by the Silver Regulatory Council A.C. of Taxco, Guerrero — the only body in Mexico that guarantees the authenticity of .925 sterling silver.
certification.cta: I want my certified piece — WhatsApp

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I know the silver is authentic?
faq.a1: Every piece includes a physical hologram certificate issued by the Silver Regulatory Council A.C. of Taxco under NOM-033/1-SE-2020. You can also request a video of your piece before buying.
faq.q2: Does the silver tarnish or cause allergies?
faq.a2: Certified .925 silver contains no nickel or lead. It's safe for sensitive skin. With proper care, which we explain on delivery, it lasts a lifetime.
faq.q3: How does the buying process work?
faq.a3: Choose your piece, message us on WhatsApp, we send real photos and a quote, you confirm and we ship. No accounts or forms required.
faq.q4: Do you ship to the USA?
faq.a4: Yes, we ship nationwide across the USA. Secure, discreet packaging with a tracking number. Estimated time: 3 to 5 business days.
faq.a5: Absolutely. For rings and bracelets we help you find your exact size on WhatsApp before confirming your order.
faq.q6: What if my piece arrives damaged?
faq.a6: We guarantee perfect delivery. If something goes wrong, we replace the piece at no extra cost. Your satisfaction is our priority.

ctaFinal.headline:
Your perfect piece
is waiting for you.
ctaFinal.subheadline: Message us now and get personalized attention. We reply in under 5 minutes.
